groups.title: FOOD PROCUREMENT METHODS
groups.explanation: Ways people obtain food from nature or production.

groups.title: MEMBER OF A DETROIT SPORTS TEAM
groups.explanation: Singular forms of Detroit pro sports team names (Lions, Pistons, Red Wings, Tigers).

groups.title: FEATURES OF A CLASSIC VOTING BOOTH
groups.explanation: Things you’d find in an old-school voting setup.

groups.title: THEY HAVE BOLTS
groups.explanation: Each is associated with bolts (neck bolts, hardware bolts, lightning bolts, and lock bolts).

hints: Ways to get food in different environments.
Detroit teams, but in the singular.
All relate to bolts in different senses.
